title: dactylorhiza carpatica
intro: Dactylorhiza carpatica, also known as the Carpathian marsh orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza carpatica include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to support the immune system and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
